title: Kerala elections: Supplyco offers 1 kg of ‘puttu’ powder for ₹1 to incentivise voter turnout, but there’s a catch
description: Voters will be eligible to purchase 1 kg of Sabari ‘puttu’ powder for ₹1 on the two days following the polls, but offer applicable to customers who make purchases worth more than ₹1,000 on non-subsidised items at Supplyco outlets. Voters must present proof of voting by showing indelible ink mark on finger
